domain: Finance, AI Autonomous Agents, Crypto/DeFi, Lead Generation for Law Firms

headings.usage: Use for primary page headers and marketing hero sections.

mono.usage: Blockchain logs, Swarm Manager terminal, Agent status, Crypto metrics.

layout_strategy.spacing: Tight (gap-4 or gap-6) for dashboards. Generous (p-12 to p-24) for CapitalColony marketing pages.
layout_strategy.borders: 1px solid borders (border-white/10). No soft shadows on cards. Use pure structural lines.
layout_strategy.radius: rounded-sm or rounded-none for a crisp, high-end technical feel.

surfaces.dashboard_cards: Flat background (#121212), 1px subtle border, no shadow.
surfaces.active_deals: The 'Tracing Beam' effect. Glowing gold border for active gold findings.

animation.interaction: Micro-interactions for feedback. hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/30 transition-all duration-200.
animation.pipeline: Use framer-motion stagger logic for 'PENDING_EXECUTION → EXECUTED → COLLECTED'.
animation.realtime_feed: Smooth entry animations (opacity 0 to 1, slide up 10px) for incoming blockchain signals.

icons.instructions: Use Lucide icons matching the text color or accent color. Do not use multiple colors per icon.

Dashboard.layout: Control Room bento grid. Top metrics (col-span-1), Main feed (col-span-2 or 3).

ControlRoom.description: Lead CRM for Melbourne law firm.
ControlRoom.layout: High-density data tables. Manrope body, JetBrains Mono for ID/Date.

StrikeDeck.layout: Grid of tracking cards (Gold finding pipeline).

Rover.layout: Terminal look (Retro-futurism) inside a luxury card. JetBrains mono, progress bars.

CapitalColony.layout: Swiss poster layout. Asymmetrical, massive typography, Hero image overlay (bg-black/50).

LegalColony.layout: Gallery style with abstract luxury architecture images.

hero_gold_abstract.usage: Hero section background for CapitalColony waitlist.

cyber_network_glowing.description: Abstract blue glowing lines on dark background.
cyber_network_glowing.usage: Swarm Manager background or Autonomous Vault visualizer.

testing_attributes.instructions: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building hybrid system: Lead generation UI mixed with AI Web3 capabilities. Prioritize raw structure for marketing (CapitalColony), use custom Shadcn UI for the dashboard (ControlRoom).
Ensure the gold highlights (#FFB800) are reserved for actions or specific Gold-Hunter elements. Do not overuse it.
The Autonomous Vault and Swarm Manager must feel technically dense. Utilize the 'JetBrains Mono' font for all numbers, logs, and metrics.
Implement pure dark mode (#080808 background) with 1px border cards (#121212 bg). Do not use soft gray shadows.
Rely ENTIRELY on the provided media URLs for backgrounds and avatars. Missing placeholders are strictly FORBIDDEN.
Enforce proper contrast on all hover states (e.g., hover:text-white or hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:border-white/30).
